title: Termination
doc_html:
§1289.5. Termination

            The provisions of this Subpart shall terminate on January 1, 2024.

            Acts 2014, No. 258, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.415 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.; Acts 2020, No. 157, §2.
doc_text:
§1289.5.  Termination
The provisions of this Subpart shall terminate on January 1, 2024.
Acts 2014, No. 258, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.415 by HCR 84 of 2015
R.S.; Acts 2020, No. 157, §2.
